xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric package¶

PyTorch Geometric dataset exports.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.E3EEBatch(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Protocol

Protocol for batches emitted by E3EEDataset.collate_fn.

Node fields are padded to (batch, max_nodes, ...). Flat edge and path indices are offset into the padded batch * max_nodes layout.

x: Tensor¶
mask: Tensor¶
absorber_index: Tensor¶
edge_src: Tensor¶
edge_dst: Tensor¶
edge_weight: Tensor¶
edge_vec: Tensor¶
att_dst: Tensor¶
att_dist: Tensor¶
att_vec: Tensor¶
path_j: Tensor¶
path_k: Tensor¶
path_r0j: Tensor¶
path_r0k: Tensor¶
path_rjk: Tensor¶
path_cosangle: Tensor¶
path_batch: Tensor¶
energies: Tensor¶
intensities: Tensor¶
file_name: list[str]¶
__init__(*args, **kwargs)¶
class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.E3EEDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_structure, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale)[source]¶

Bases: TorchGeometricDataset

E3EE dataset that emits one graph sample per absorber site.

The dataset preserves absorber ordering and supports both periodic Structures and non-periodic Molecules. All edges and absorber- centred triplet path scalars are precomputed at prepare() time using the shared graph utilities, so the model does not need to rebuild geometry at forward time.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Main graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Main graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • use_path_branch (bool) – Whether to precompute absorber-centered paths.

  • max_paths_per_structure (int) – Maximum absorber paths saved per structure.

  • graph_method (str) – Main graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for graph construction.

  • att_cutoff (float) – Attention graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • att_max_num_neighbors (int) – Attention graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • att_graph_method (str) – Attention graph construction method.

  • att_min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional attention Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • att_cov_radii_scale (float) – Attention graph covalent-radii scale.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_structure, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale)[source]¶

Initialize the E3EE dataset.

collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate absorber-centered graph samples into one padded batch.

Node tensors are padded to (batch, max_nodes, ...) and flat edge/path indices are offset by batch_index * max_nodes.

Parameters:

batch (list[BaseData]) – PyG graph samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

Batch

Returns:

PyG batch with E3EE-specific padded tensors attached.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this E3EE dataset.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.E3EEFullBatch(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Protocol

Protocol for batches emitted by E3EEFullDataset.collate_fn.

Node fields are padded to (batch, max_nodes, ...). Targets are concatenated over absorber sites across the batch.

x: Tensor¶
mask: Tensor¶
absorber_mask: Tensor¶
edge_src: Tensor¶
edge_dst: Tensor¶
edge_weight: Tensor¶
edge_vec: Tensor¶
att_src: Tensor¶
att_dst: Tensor¶
att_dist: Tensor¶
att_vec: Tensor¶
path_center: Tensor¶
path_j: Tensor¶
path_k: Tensor¶
path_r0j: Tensor¶
path_r0k: Tensor¶
path_rjk: Tensor¶
path_cosangle: Tensor¶
energies: Tensor¶
intensities: Tensor¶
file_name: list[str]¶
__init__(*args, **kwargs)¶
class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.E3EEFullDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_site, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale, use_absorber_mask)[source]¶

Bases: TorchGeometricDataset

Full-structure E3EE dataset that emits one graph per structure.

The dataset supports periodic and non-periodic structures and predicts a spectrum for every atom. Atoms with a ground-truth spectrum are flagged in absorber_mask; the training loop selects those rows via the mask (same pattern as SchNet / DimeNet).

All edges are computed once per structure. Absorber-centred triplet paths are computed for every site independently (with max_paths_per_site paths each) and tagged with path_center so that the model can scatter them into the per-atom layout.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Main graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Main graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • use_path_branch (bool) – Whether to precompute site-centered paths.

  • max_paths_per_site (int) – Maximum paths saved per site.

  • graph_method (str) – Main graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for graph construction.

  • att_cutoff (float) – Attention graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • att_max_num_neighbors (int) – Attention graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • att_graph_method (str) – Attention graph construction method.

  • att_min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional attention Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • att_cov_radii_scale (float) – Attention graph covalent-radii scale.

  • use_absorber_mask (bool) – Whether attention/path data are limited to absorber sites.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_site, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale, use_absorber_mask)[source]¶

Initialize the full-structure E3EE dataset.

collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate full-structure graph samples into one padded batch.

Node tensors are padded to (batch, max_nodes, ...) and flat edge/path indices, including path_center, are offset by batch_index * max_nodes.

Parameters:

batch (list[BaseData]) – PyG graph samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

Batch

Returns:

PyG batch with full-structure E3EE tensors attached.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this full-structure E3EE dataset.

Protocol for batches emitted by GemNetDataset.collate_fn.

pos: Tensor¶
batch: Tensor¶
edge_index: Tensor¶

edge_vec: Tensor¶
id_c: Tensor¶
id_a: Tensor¶
id_swap: Tensor¶
id3_reduce_ca: Tensor¶
id3_expand_ba: Tensor¶
Kidx3: Tensor¶
absorber_mask: Tensor¶

intensities: Tensor¶
file_name: list[str]¶

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.GemNetData(x=None, edge_index=None, edge_attr=None, y=None, pos=None, time=None, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Data

PyG Data subclass for GemNet and GemNet-OC samples.

The custom __inc__ is critical for correct PyG batching of all edge / triplet / quadruplet / intermediate indices across multiple graphs.

__inc__(key, value, *args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Return PyG batching increments for GemNet index fields.

Parameters:

  • key (str) – Data attribute currently being batched.

  • value (Any) – Attribute value currently being batched.

  • *args (Any) – Additional PyG arguments.

  • **kwargs (Any) – Additional PyG keyword arguments.

Return type:

Any

Returns:

Increment used by PyG for key.

__cat_dim__(key, value, *args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Return the concatenation dimension for GemNet graph fields.

Parameters:

  • key (str) – Data attribute currently being batched.

  • value (Any) – Attribute value currently being batched.

  • *args (Any) – Additional PyG arguments.

  • **kwargs (Any) – Additional PyG keyword arguments.

Return type:

Any

Returns:

Concatenation dimension used by PyG for key.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.GemNetDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, quadruplets, int_cutoff, int_max_neighbors=None, int_graph_method=None, int_min_facet_area=None, int_cov_radii_scale=None, oc_mode=False, oc_cutoff_aeaint=None, oc_cutoff_aint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aeaint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aint=None, oc_graph_method_aeaint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aeaint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aeaint=None, oc_graph_method_aint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aint=None)[source]¶

Bases: TorchGeometricDataset

Dataset for GemNet and GemNet-OC graph inputs.

Mixing graph methods is supported (e.g. graph_method="voronoi" for a compact main graph paired with int_graph_method="radius" for a larger interaction graph). A derived graph is reused from a previously-built one only when all of (cutoff, max_num_neighbors, method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale) match; otherwise it is built from scratch.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Main graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Main graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • graph_method (str) – Main graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold for the main graph.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for the main graph.

  • quadruplets (bool) – Whether to compute quadruplet indices.

  • int_cutoff (float | None) – Interaction graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • int_max_neighbors (int | None) – Optional interaction graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • int_graph_method (str | None) – Optional interaction graph construction method.

  • int_min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional interaction Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • int_cov_radii_scale (float | None) – Optional interaction covalent-radii scale.

  • oc_mode (bool) – Whether to precompute GemNet-OC auxiliary graphs and mixed triplets.

  • oc_cutoff_aeaint (float | None) – Atom-edge-atom graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • oc_cutoff_aint (float | None) – Atom-atom graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • oc_max_neighbors_aeaint (int | None) – Atom-edge-atom graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • oc_max_neighbors_aint (int | None) – Atom-atom graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • oc_graph_method_aeaint (str | None) – Atom-edge-atom graph construction method override.

  • oc_min_facet_area_aeaint (float | str | None) – Atom-edge-atom Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • oc_cov_radii_scale_aeaint (float | None) – Atom-edge-atom covalent-radii scale.

  • oc_graph_method_aint (str | None) – Atom-atom graph construction method override.

  • oc_min_facet_area_aint (float | str | None) – Atom-atom Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • oc_cov_radii_scale_aint (float | None) – Atom-atom covalent-radii scale.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, quadruplets, int_cutoff, int_max_neighbors=None, int_graph_method=None, int_min_facet_area=None, int_cov_radii_scale=None, oc_mode=False, oc_cutoff_aeaint=None, oc_cutoff_aint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aeaint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aint=None, oc_graph_method_aeaint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aeaint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aeaint=None, oc_graph_method_aint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aint=None)[source]¶

Initialize the GemNet dataset.

collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate GemNet graph samples into one PyG batch.

Parameters:

batch (list[BaseData]) – GemNet graph samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

Batch

Returns:

PyG batch with target tensors concatenated over absorber sites.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this GemNet dataset.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.RichGraphDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile)[source]¶

Work-in-progress graph dataset with radius-graph connectivity.

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile)[source]¶

Initialize the rich graph dataset.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this rich graph dataset.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.GeometryGraphData(x=None, edge_index=None, edge_attr=None, y=None, pos=None, time=None, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Data

PyG data object with custom batching increments for triplet indices.

__inc__(key, value, *args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Return PyG batching increments for graph index fields.

Parameters:

  • key (str) – Data attribute currently being batched.

  • value (Any) – Attribute value currently being batched.

  • *args (Any) – Additional PyG arguments.

  • **kwargs (Any) – Additional PyG keyword arguments.

Return type:

Any

Returns:

Increment used by PyG for key.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.GeometryGraphDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, compute_angles, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale)[source]¶

Bases: TorchGeometricDataset

Geometry-based graph dataset.

Supports two edge construction methods:

  • graph_method="radius": distance-cutoff radius graph.

  • graph_method="voronoi": Voronoi-tessellation graph (still bounded by cutoff; Voronoi neighbors with distances above cutoff are dropped).

In both cases edge_weight is the Cartesian edge length, and the returned graph is bidirectional (see xanesnet.utils.graph).

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Per-source neighbor cap.

  • compute_angles (bool) – Whether to precompute triplet angles.

  • graph_method (str) – Graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for graph construction.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, compute_angles, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale)[source]¶

Initialize the geometry graph dataset.

collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate geometry graph samples into one PyG batch.

Parameters:

batch (list[BaseData]) – Geometry graph samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

Batch

Returns:

PyG batch with target tensors concatenated over absorber sites.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this geometry graph dataset.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.E3EEDatasetMp(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_structure, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale, num_workers)[source]¶

Bases: MpDatasetMixin, E3EEDataset

Multiprocessing variant of E3EEDataset. See the parent for semantics.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource used during preparation.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Main graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Main graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • use_path_branch (bool) – Whether to precompute absorber-centered paths.

  • max_paths_per_structure (int) – Maximum absorber paths saved per structure.

  • graph_method (str) – Main graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for graph construction.

  • att_cutoff (float) – Attention graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • att_max_num_neighbors (int) – Attention graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • att_graph_method (str) – Attention graph construction method.

  • att_min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional attention Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • att_cov_radii_scale (float) – Attention graph covalent-radii scale.

  • num_workers (int | None) – Requested worker process count.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_structure, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale, num_workers)[source]¶

Initialize a multiprocessing E3EE dataset.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.E3EEFullDatasetMp(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_site, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale, use_absorber_mask, num_workers)[source]¶

Bases: MpDatasetMixin, E3EEFullDataset

Multiprocessing variant of E3EEFullDataset.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource used during preparation.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Main graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Main graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • use_path_branch (bool) – Whether to precompute site-centered paths.

  • max_paths_per_site (int) – Maximum paths saved per site.

  • graph_method (str) – Main graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for graph construction.

  • att_cutoff (float) – Attention graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • att_max_num_neighbors (int) – Attention graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • att_graph_method (str) – Attention graph construction method.

  • att_min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional attention Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • att_cov_radii_scale (float) – Attention graph covalent-radii scale.

  • use_absorber_mask (bool) – Whether attention/path data are limited to absorber sites.

  • num_workers (int | None) – Requested worker process count.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_site, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale, use_absorber_mask, num_workers)[source]¶

Initialize a multiprocessing full-structure E3EE dataset.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.GemNetDatasetMp(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, quadruplets, int_cutoff, int_max_neighbors=None, int_graph_method=None, int_min_facet_area=None, int_cov_radii_scale=None, oc_mode=False, oc_cutoff_aeaint=None, oc_cutoff_aint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aeaint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aint=None, oc_graph_method_aeaint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aeaint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aeaint=None, oc_graph_method_aint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aint=None, num_workers=None)[source]¶

Bases: MpDatasetMixin, GemNetDataset

Multiprocessing variant of GemNetDataset (covers GemNet and GemNet-OC).

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource used during preparation.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Main graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Main graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • graph_method (str) – Main graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold for the main graph.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for the main graph.

  • quadruplets (bool) – Whether to compute quadruplet indices.

  • int_cutoff (float | None) – Interaction graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • int_max_neighbors (int | None) – Optional interaction graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • int_graph_method (str | None) – Optional interaction graph construction method.

  • int_min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional interaction Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • int_cov_radii_scale (float | None) – Optional interaction covalent-radii scale.

  • oc_mode (bool) – Whether to precompute GemNet-OC auxiliary graphs and mixed triplets.

  • oc_cutoff_aeaint (float | None) – Atom-edge-atom graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • oc_cutoff_aint (float | None) – Atom-atom graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • oc_max_neighbors_aeaint (int | None) – Atom-edge-atom graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • oc_max_neighbors_aint (int | None) – Atom-atom graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • oc_graph_method_aeaint (str | None) – Atom-edge-atom graph construction method override.

  • oc_min_facet_area_aeaint (float | str | None) – Atom-edge-atom Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • oc_cov_radii_scale_aeaint (float | None) – Atom-edge-atom covalent-radii scale.

  • oc_graph_method_aint (str | None) – Atom-atom graph construction method override.

  • oc_min_facet_area_aint (float | str | None) – Atom-atom Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • oc_cov_radii_scale_aint (float | None) – Atom-atom covalent-radii scale.

  • num_workers (int | None) – Requested worker process count.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, quadruplets, int_cutoff, int_max_neighbors=None, int_graph_method=None, int_min_facet_area=None, int_cov_radii_scale=None, oc_mode=False, oc_cutoff_aeaint=None, oc_cutoff_aint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aeaint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aint=None, oc_graph_method_aeaint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aeaint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aeaint=None, oc_graph_method_aint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aint=None, num_workers=None)[source]¶

Initialize a multiprocessing GemNet dataset.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.GeometryGraphDatasetMp(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, compute_angles, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, num_workers)[source]¶

Bases: MpDatasetMixin, GeometryGraphDataset

Multiprocessing variant of GeometryGraphDataset.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource used during preparation.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Per-source neighbor cap.

  • compute_angles (bool) – Whether to precompute triplet angles.

  • graph_method (str) – Graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for graph construction.

  • num_workers (int | None) – Requested worker process count.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, compute_angles, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, num_workers)[source]¶

Initialize a multiprocessing geometry graph dataset.

Submodules¶

xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.e3ee module¶

E3EE PyTorch Geometric dataset implementation.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.e3ee.E3EEBatch(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Protocol

Protocol for batches emitted by E3EEDataset.collate_fn.

Node fields are padded to (batch, max_nodes, ...). Flat edge and path indices are offset into the padded batch * max_nodes layout.

x: Tensor¶
mask: Tensor¶
absorber_index: Tensor¶
edge_src: Tensor¶
edge_dst: Tensor¶
edge_weight: Tensor¶
edge_vec: Tensor¶
att_dst: Tensor¶
att_dist: Tensor¶
att_vec: Tensor¶
path_j: Tensor¶
path_k: Tensor¶
path_r0j: Tensor¶
path_r0k: Tensor¶
path_rjk: Tensor¶
path_cosangle: Tensor¶
path_batch: Tensor¶
energies: Tensor¶
intensities: Tensor¶
file_name: list[str]¶
__init__(*args, **kwargs)¶
class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.e3ee.E3EEDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_structure, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale)[source]¶

Bases: TorchGeometricDataset

E3EE dataset that emits one graph sample per absorber site.

The dataset preserves absorber ordering and supports both periodic Structures and non-periodic Molecules. All edges and absorber- centred triplet path scalars are precomputed at prepare() time using the shared graph utilities, so the model does not need to rebuild geometry at forward time.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Main graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Main graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • use_path_branch (bool) – Whether to precompute absorber-centered paths.

  • max_paths_per_structure (int) – Maximum absorber paths saved per structure.

  • graph_method (str) – Main graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for graph construction.

  • att_cutoff (float) – Attention graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • att_max_num_neighbors (int) – Attention graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • att_graph_method (str) – Attention graph construction method.

  • att_min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional attention Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • att_cov_radii_scale (float) – Attention graph covalent-radii scale.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_structure, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale)[source]¶

Initialize the E3EE dataset.

collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate absorber-centered graph samples into one padded batch.

Node tensors are padded to (batch, max_nodes, ...) and flat edge/path indices are offset by batch_index * max_nodes.

Parameters:

batch (list[BaseData]) – PyG graph samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

Batch

Returns:

PyG batch with E3EE-specific padded tensors attached.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this E3EE dataset.

xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.e3ee_full module¶

Full-structure E3EE PyTorch Geometric dataset implementation.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.e3ee_full.E3EEFullBatch(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Protocol

Protocol for batches emitted by E3EEFullDataset.collate_fn.

Node fields are padded to (batch, max_nodes, ...). Targets are concatenated over absorber sites across the batch.

x: Tensor¶
mask: Tensor¶
absorber_mask: Tensor¶
edge_src: Tensor¶
edge_dst: Tensor¶
edge_weight: Tensor¶
edge_vec: Tensor¶
att_src: Tensor¶
att_dst: Tensor¶
att_dist: Tensor¶
att_vec: Tensor¶
path_center: Tensor¶
path_j: Tensor¶
path_k: Tensor¶
path_r0j: Tensor¶
path_r0k: Tensor¶
path_rjk: Tensor¶
path_cosangle: Tensor¶
energies: Tensor¶
intensities: Tensor¶
file_name: list[str]¶
__init__(*args, **kwargs)¶
class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.e3ee_full.E3EEFullDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_site, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale, use_absorber_mask)[source]¶

Bases: TorchGeometricDataset

Full-structure E3EE dataset that emits one graph per structure.

The dataset supports periodic and non-periodic structures and predicts a spectrum for every atom. Atoms with a ground-truth spectrum are flagged in absorber_mask; the training loop selects those rows via the mask (same pattern as SchNet / DimeNet).

All edges are computed once per structure. Absorber-centred triplet paths are computed for every site independently (with max_paths_per_site paths each) and tagged with path_center so that the model can scatter them into the per-atom layout.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Main graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Main graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • use_path_branch (bool) – Whether to precompute site-centered paths.

  • max_paths_per_site (int) – Maximum paths saved per site.

  • graph_method (str) – Main graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for graph construction.

  • att_cutoff (float) – Attention graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • att_max_num_neighbors (int) – Attention graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • att_graph_method (str) – Attention graph construction method.

  • att_min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional attention Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • att_cov_radii_scale (float) – Attention graph covalent-radii scale.

  • use_absorber_mask (bool) – Whether attention/path data are limited to absorber sites.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, use_path_branch, max_paths_per_site, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, att_cutoff, att_max_num_neighbors, att_graph_method, att_min_facet_area, att_cov_radii_scale, use_absorber_mask)[source]¶

Initialize the full-structure E3EE dataset.

collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate full-structure graph samples into one padded batch.

Node tensors are padded to (batch, max_nodes, ...) and flat edge/path indices, including path_center, are offset by batch_index * max_nodes.

Parameters:

batch (list[BaseData]) – PyG graph samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

Batch

Returns:

PyG batch with full-structure E3EE tensors attached.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this full-structure E3EE dataset.

xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.gemnet module¶

GemNet and GemNet-OC PyTorch Geometric dataset implementation.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.gemnet.GemNetData(x=None, edge_index=None, edge_attr=None, y=None, pos=None, time=None, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Data

PyG Data subclass for GemNet and GemNet-OC samples.

The custom __inc__ is critical for correct PyG batching of all edge / triplet / quadruplet / intermediate indices across multiple graphs.

__inc__(key, value, *args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Return PyG batching increments for GemNet index fields.

Parameters:

  • key (str) – Data attribute currently being batched.

  • value (Any) – Attribute value currently being batched.

  • *args (Any) – Additional PyG arguments.

  • **kwargs (Any) – Additional PyG keyword arguments.

Return type:

Any

Returns:

Increment used by PyG for key.

__cat_dim__(key, value, *args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Return the concatenation dimension for GemNet graph fields.

Parameters:

  • key (str) – Data attribute currently being batched.

  • value (Any) – Attribute value currently being batched.

  • *args (Any) – Additional PyG arguments.

  • **kwargs (Any) – Additional PyG keyword arguments.

Return type:

Any

Returns:

Concatenation dimension used by PyG for key.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.gemnet.GemNetBatch(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Protocol

Protocol for batches emitted by GemNetDataset.collate_fn.

x: Tensor¶
pos: Tensor¶
batch: Tensor¶
edge_index: Tensor¶
edge_weight: Tensor¶
edge_vec: Tensor¶
id_c: Tensor¶
id_a: Tensor¶
id_swap: Tensor¶
id3_reduce_ca: Tensor¶
id3_expand_ba: Tensor¶
Kidx3: Tensor¶
absorber_mask: Tensor¶
energies: Tensor¶
intensities: Tensor¶
file_name: list[str]¶
__init__(*args, **kwargs)¶
class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.gemnet.GemNetDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, quadruplets, int_cutoff, int_max_neighbors=None, int_graph_method=None, int_min_facet_area=None, int_cov_radii_scale=None, oc_mode=False, oc_cutoff_aeaint=None, oc_cutoff_aint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aeaint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aint=None, oc_graph_method_aeaint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aeaint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aeaint=None, oc_graph_method_aint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aint=None)[source]¶

Bases: TorchGeometricDataset

Dataset for GemNet and GemNet-OC graph inputs.

Mixing graph methods is supported (e.g. graph_method="voronoi" for a compact main graph paired with int_graph_method="radius" for a larger interaction graph). A derived graph is reused from a previously-built one only when all of (cutoff, max_num_neighbors, method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale) match; otherwise it is built from scratch.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Main graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Main graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • graph_method (str) – Main graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold for the main graph.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for the main graph.

  • quadruplets (bool) – Whether to compute quadruplet indices.

  • int_cutoff (float | None) – Interaction graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • int_max_neighbors (int | None) – Optional interaction graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • int_graph_method (str | None) – Optional interaction graph construction method.

  • int_min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional interaction Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • int_cov_radii_scale (float | None) – Optional interaction covalent-radii scale.

  • oc_mode (bool) – Whether to precompute GemNet-OC auxiliary graphs and mixed triplets.

  • oc_cutoff_aeaint (float | None) – Atom-edge-atom graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • oc_cutoff_aint (float | None) – Atom-atom graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • oc_max_neighbors_aeaint (int | None) – Atom-edge-atom graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • oc_max_neighbors_aint (int | None) – Atom-atom graph per-source neighbor cap.

  • oc_graph_method_aeaint (str | None) – Atom-edge-atom graph construction method override.

  • oc_min_facet_area_aeaint (float | str | None) – Atom-edge-atom Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • oc_cov_radii_scale_aeaint (float | None) – Atom-edge-atom covalent-radii scale.

  • oc_graph_method_aint (str | None) – Atom-atom graph construction method override.

  • oc_min_facet_area_aint (float | str | None) – Atom-atom Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • oc_cov_radii_scale_aint (float | None) – Atom-atom covalent-radii scale.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale, quadruplets, int_cutoff, int_max_neighbors=None, int_graph_method=None, int_min_facet_area=None, int_cov_radii_scale=None, oc_mode=False, oc_cutoff_aeaint=None, oc_cutoff_aint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aeaint=None, oc_max_neighbors_aint=None, oc_graph_method_aeaint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aeaint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aeaint=None, oc_graph_method_aint=None, oc_min_facet_area_aint=None, oc_cov_radii_scale_aint=None)[source]¶

Initialize the GemNet dataset.

collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate GemNet graph samples into one PyG batch.

Parameters:

batch (list[BaseData]) – GemNet graph samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

Batch

Returns:

PyG batch with target tensors concatenated over absorber sites.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this GemNet dataset.

xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.geometrygraph module¶

Geometry graph PyTorch Geometric dataset implementation.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.geometrygraph.GeometryGraphData(x=None, edge_index=None, edge_attr=None, y=None, pos=None, time=None, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Data

PyG data object with custom batching increments for triplet indices.

__inc__(key, value, *args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Return PyG batching increments for graph index fields.

Parameters:

  • key (str) – Data attribute currently being batched.

  • value (Any) – Attribute value currently being batched.

  • *args (Any) – Additional PyG arguments.

  • **kwargs (Any) – Additional PyG keyword arguments.

Return type:

Any

Increment used by PyG for key.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.geometrygraph.GeometryGraphBatch(*args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Protocol

Protocol for batches emitted by GeometryGraphDataset.collate_fn.

x: Tensor¶
pos: Tensor¶
edge_index: Tensor¶
edge_weight: Tensor¶
batch: Tensor¶
angle: Tensor¶
idx_kj: Tensor¶
idx_ji: Tensor¶
energies: Tensor¶
intensities: Tensor¶
absorber_mask: Tensor¶
file_name: list[str]¶
__init__(*args, **kwargs)¶
class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.geometrygraph.GeometryGraphDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, compute_angles, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale)[source]¶

Bases: TorchGeometricDataset

Geometry-based graph dataset.

Supports two edge construction methods:

  • graph_method="radius": distance-cutoff radius graph.

  • graph_method="voronoi": Voronoi-tessellation graph (still bounded by cutoff; Voronoi neighbors with distances above cutoff are dropped).

In both cases edge_weight is the Cartesian edge length, and the returned graph is bidirectional (see xanesnet.utils.graph).

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • cutoff (float) – Graph cutoff in Angstrom.

  • max_num_neighbors (int) – Per-source neighbor cap.

  • compute_angles (bool) – Whether to precompute triplet angles.

  • graph_method (str) – Graph construction method.

  • min_facet_area (float | str | None) – Optional Voronoi facet-area threshold.

  • cov_radii_scale (float) – Covalent-radii scale for graph construction.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, cutoff, max_num_neighbors, compute_angles, graph_method, min_facet_area, cov_radii_scale)[source]¶

Initialize the geometry graph dataset.

collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate geometry graph samples into one PyG batch.

Parameters:

batch (list[BaseData]) – Geometry graph samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

Batch

Returns:

PyG batch with target tensors concatenated over absorber sites.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this geometry graph dataset.

xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.richgraph module¶

Work-in-progress rich graph dataset implementation.

class xanesnet.datasets.torchgeometric.richgraph.RichGraphDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile)[source]¶

Bases: TorchGeometricDataset

Work-in-progress graph dataset with radius-graph connectivity.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile)[source]¶

Initialize the rich graph dataset.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this rich graph dataset.
